title: Ancient Reforging
description: Gives you the abiltiy to forge ancient affixed gear with Apotheosis/Zenith!
body:
![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/34b8abb6ce1aef55299f9dcca46b421d348789ec.png)

**Requires Apotheosis/[Zenith](https://modrinth.com/mod/zenith)!**



Ancient Reforging adds a new reforging table to Apotheosis/Zenith to let you use the ancient material to reforge your tools into something even BETTER!

Pretty self explanatory

![recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5a97b2ec368ddd4a38a2c32c4149fdf050cf9382.png)
 

If you have any suggestions on something else this mod should have , put it in the comments!

![reforge gui](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/09d258e34ccdf52fe9b75aed3500663c14698b9b.png)

The values of ancient reforging are higher in Apotheosis/Zenith, I lowered them a tiny bit just to make the level requirement not as absurd.

Before you ask about Apotheotic Additions (Forge), I'll think about adding support for those materials.


Credits:

Shadows_of_Fire for the amazing mod Apotheosis!
TheWinABagel for the amazing port for Fabric!
